title: Canonical-default /tmp/mk-hf-embed socket path: residual TOCTOU between lstat and mkdir
claim: Hardcoded /tmp default is predictable but assertSocketDirOwnership/assertSunPathLimit ARE invoked against the canonical path; only residual is microsecond TOCTOU between lstatSync and mkdirSync which is non-exploitable from a normal local user
downgradeTrigger: future code path bypassing assertSocketDirOwnership for the canonical default becomes P1
counterevidenceSought: grep for mkdirSync/unlinkSync/chown/chmod against /tmp/mk-hf-embed outside assert+mkdir path; rg for alternative bind paths

title: REQ-010 leaseId token generator: crypto.randomUUID() is appropriate for fencing
claim: RFC 4122 v4 UUID from crypto.randomBytes(16) — 122 bits of CSPRNG entropy, no timestamp/MAC/PID leak, no realistic collision for realistic lease counts
counterevidenceSought: anyone observing leaseId outside the lease file; rg for leaseId in stdout/JSON-RPC/logs

title: REQ-009 background:true default — no new attack surface
claim: Strict omitted-only injection expands convenience not trust boundary; the MCP tool is already available to the calling agent; job-queue has bounded concurrency per iter 4
downgradeTrigger: future loop-bypass of job-queue becomes P2 DoS
counterevidenceSought: alternative dispatch paths bypassing job-queue; auto-invoke loops without rate-limit

title: Process-spawn sweep: every spawn uses fixed command + arg array, no shell-string concat
claim: All spawnSync/spawn calls use literal command name + array of args; ps -p pid uses pid from our own lease file; npm calls use hardcoded args; no shell, no exec, no eval

title: Secrets/credentials: no hardcoded tokens, API keys, or credentials in 16 scope files
claim: LLM_REFORMULATION_API_KEY is user-supplied env (not embedded); scrubSecretsDetailed actively redacts secrets before durable save; CHILD_ENV_ALLOWLIST enforces minimal env-var whitelist
counterevidenceSought: rg for sk-/ghp_/Bearer xxxx/aws_*; fixed 32-char hex tokens

notes: REQ-009/010/011 spec/code alignment verified with file:line citations
No new CHK items; flag iter 6 traceability to review CHK-079 under that lens
